title: The Straw Hats Reach Egghead
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Nami, York, Unknown person #2, Kizaru, Unknown person #3 as The Straw Hats reach Egghead, meet Bonney, and discover Vegapunk’s impossible future island while Law is drawn into Blackbeard’s ambush.
scene: The Straw Hats reach Egghead, meet Bonney, and discover Vegapunk’s impossible future island while Law is drawn into Blackbeard’s ambush.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I bet they'll all love the food machine!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: All four of you have bulging bellies!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, I ought to get back to work...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I don't run riot, no one will.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I think it's safe to assume...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Odd, this place seemed deserted a second ago...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Were they hiding because they weren't sure about us?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Isn't it a little hot for those outfits?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nothing beats free clothes after a complimentary meal!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mine still feel sticky from all that sea water, it'd be nice to change!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These would make for perfect discusses... but it's probably too late for that.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The boots make me feel like I'm floating!!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Opening through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
